Surviving Christmas (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $11,198,345Details
International Box Office $3,130,468
Worldwide Box Office $14,328,813
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,441,356 (39.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.52 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:78.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,750 opening theaters/2,755 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $21,567,181

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 22nd, 2004 (Wide) by Dreamworks SKG
Video Release: December 21st, 2004 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content, language and a brief drug reference
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Release detail: Christmas in November
Social setting: Christmas
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Languages: English
